chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI CP No.D-4773 of 2022 ____________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) 1. For order on Misc. No.14188/2022 2. For order on office objections 3. For hearing of Misc. No.20292/2022 4. For hearing of main case 28.08.2025 Mr. Ovais Ali Shah, advocate for the respondent Mr. Sandeep Malani, AAG Muhammad Sohail Imran, Legal Officer and Khadim Hussain, Law Officer, SZABUL --------- This is an old case of 2022, which is over 03 years ago. It was last taken up on 02.10.2023, which is almost two years ago, on that day none was present for the petitioner without intimation and the matter was adjourned in the interest of justice. Despite the lapse of two years, learned counsel for the petitioner has failed to diligently pursue this petition. Once-again, today, none present for the petitioner without intimation. It appears that the petitioner has lost interest in pursuing this old petition, which is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution alongwith pending application(s). Head of Const. Benches JUDGE Nadir*
